task: Initialize a workspace repository, commit one deterministic workspace note, and verify the repository ends clean.

git_eval.commit_message: chore: add deterministic git eval note

expected_criteria: Git workflow succeeds with an initial deterministic commit and a clean post-commit status.

task: Start from a seeded repository snapshot, create a baseline commit, then verify a second commit reports no changes and leaves the repository clean.
expected_criteria: Git workflow recognizes a clean repository and returns a successful no-op commit without creating a new commit hash.

task: Create a deterministic two-branch merge conflict on a seeded markdown file, resolve the conflict with the local version, complete the merge, and verify the repository ends clean.

setup_commands:
printf '# Shared Skill Notes

base entry
theirs keeps catalog metadata
' > shared_skill.md

printf '# Shared Skill Notes

base entry
ours keeps traceability ids
' > shared_skill.md
git_eval.merge_complete_message: merge: keep local shared skill wording

expected_criteria: Git workflow can detect a merge conflict, resolve it with the local version, complete the merge, and report a clean repository.

task: Create a deterministic merge conflict from a seeded planning note, abort the merge instead of resolving it, and verify the repository returns to a clean non-merging state.

setup_commands:
printf '# Merge Plan

remote keeps benchmark budget wording
' > merge_plan.md

printf '# Merge Plan

local keeps implementation checklist wording
' > merge_plan.md

expected_criteria: Git workflow can detect a merge conflict, abort the merge cleanly, and restore the repository to a clean non-merging state.
